title: Volos, Thessaly — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Volos, Thessaly: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Volos is a city in Thessaly with a population of 144,449. Coastal Thessalian city at the foot of Mount Pelion, known for its waterfront, tsipouro, and seafood.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
